proposal.rationale: Train telemetry shows the agent finalizes immediately on 80% of tasks and only uses static_scan in 20%, while recent prompt-only edits have not improved validation. The sampled errors suggest a workflow problem more than a wording problem: false positives like primevul_10872 over-trust speculative NULL-dereference theories from partial context, while false negatives like primevul_62, primevul_3, and primevul_0 under-investigate small or wrapper-like snippets that may still contain security-relevant missing validation. A small solve-loop change can trigger one bounded static_scan automatically for high-risk ambiguous cases before finalization, reducing premature one-shot judgments without adding repeated retries.
